name: X-Golf Grandville
address: 4830 Wilson Ave SW suite 500, Grandville, MI 49418
about: X-Golf Grandville offers a state-of-the-art indoor golf experience using advanced simulator technology with camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors. It provides a full-service venue with food, beverages, and event spaces, featuring 8 simulator bays that can accommodate groups up to 178 guests. Pricing is straightforward, charged per bay per hour, with rates varying by day of the week and discounted for seniors, military, veterans, and first responders.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through advanced camera and laser technology
All-in-one venue combining golf simulation with dining and event hosting
Flexible and straightforward pricing model accommodating groups of up to 6 per bay

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available at the venue if you don't have your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers its own full kitchen and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about one hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes, or one hour per additional person in a group.

faq.question: Is X-Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages and can arrange extra time for beginners.
